_comment: Frozen golden qrels over the shipped Acme Corp corpus (data/sample/*.md). Each entry: {query, gold_needles (substring(s) the correct chunk must contain), gold_doc}. Hand-authored from needle-verified corpus facts so the set is deterministic and mock-safe (no generation-time LLM). Used by evals/rag_ranking.eval.py and evals/rag_ranking_ci.eval.py to compute Recall@k / MRR / nDCG@k. Scale is intentionally small (~24) for the Tier-1 deterministic gate; the Tier-3 pre-release suite regenerates this at N>=100 via RAGASDataGenerator.

qrels.query: How many annual leave days does a permanent employee get?
What is the annual leave entitlement for contract employees?
How many leave days can be carried forward to the next year?
How many days per week may employees work remotely?
What is the meal allowance per month?
What is the transportation allowance?
What is the internet allowance for remote work?
What are the core working hours?
How much does car parking cost per month?
When must daily reports be submitted?
Who is the CEO of Acme Corp?
Who is the CTO of Acme Corp?
Who is the CFO?
What is the parental leave duration?
What is the paid time off per year?
What is the notice period for resignation?

What is the price of AcmePOS Professional?
What is the per-user price of AcmeCRM Business?
